spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) FROM agent_usage) AS "Tokens (all time)",
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) FROM agent_usage WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)) AS "Tokens (period)",
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6)
     FROM agent_usage u ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from) AS "Cost (all time)",
  (SELECT sum(input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6)
     FROM agent_usage u ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
     WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)) AS "Cost (period)",
  (SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM agent_events) AS "Users"

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT u.timestamp AS time, u.user_id AS metric,
    u.input_tokens AS in_val, u.output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

SELECT
  u.timestamp AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS value
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)) AS metric,
    u.input_tokens AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
    AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version) AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND skill_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
    AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    if(u.agent_name = '', 'main agent', concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)) AS metric,
    u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND (u.agent_name != '' OR u.skill_name = '')
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
    AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version) AS metric,
    u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.skill_name != ''
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
    AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by MCP tool over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    replaceOne(mcp_tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND mcp_tool_name != ''
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], mcp_tool_name)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
    AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by MCP tool over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    replaceOne(u.mcp_tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS metric,
    u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND u.mcp_tool_name != ''
    AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], u.mcp_tool_name)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
    AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Tokens by model & scope over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    input_tokens AS in_val,
    output_tokens AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
    AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cost by model & scope over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    u.timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
    u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 AS in_val,
    u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
    AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
    AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

spec.title: Cache hit rate by agent/skill/model over time

spec.rawSql:
WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT
    timestamp AS time,
    concat(multiIf(agent_name != '', 'subagent', skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', model) AS metric,
    cache_read_tokens AS cache_read,
    input_tokens AS input_tok
  FROM agent_usage
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], model)
    AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
    AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
)
SELECT time, metric, cache_read / nullIf(cache_read + input_tok, 0) AS value
FROM filtered
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS cost,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
  AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC

WITH session_durations_period AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
session_durations_all AS (
  SELECT session_id, user_id, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  GROUP BY session_id, user_id
),
user_duration_period AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_period GROUP BY user_id
),
user_duration_all AS (
  SELECT user_id, sum(duration_s) AS duration_s FROM session_durations_all GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT
  u.user_id,
  sum(u.input_tokens) AS tokens_in,
  sum(u.output_tokens) AS tokens_out,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS cost,
  any(udp.duration_s) AS session_duration_period_s,
  any(uda.duration_s) AS session_duration_all_s
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
LEFT JOIN user_duration_period udp ON udp.user_id = u.user_id
LEFT JOIN user_duration_all uda ON uda.user_id = u.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
GROUP BY u.user_id
ORDER BY (tokens_in + tokens_out) DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  toStartOfDay(timestamp) AS time,
  uniqExact(user_id) AS active_users,
  uniqExact(session_id) AS sessions
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUse') AS successes,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure') AS failures,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure') / (countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUse') + countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure')) AS error_rate
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure')
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY error_rate DESC

SELECT
  tool_name,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type = 'PostToolUse'
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC

SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUse') AS calls,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure') AS failures,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure')
  AND startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
  AND has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY calls DESC

spec.title: Permission prompt wait time (p50/p95) by tool_name

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  tool_name,
  countIf(event_type = 'PreToolUse') AS approved,
  countIf(event_type = 'PermissionDenied') AS denied,
  quantile(0.5)(latency_ms) AS p50_ms,
  quantile(0.95)(latency_ms) AS p95_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type IN ('PreToolUse', 'PermissionDenied')
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY tool_name
ORDER BY p95_ms DESC

SELECT
  timestamp,
  user_id,
  session_id,
  tool_name,
  multiIf(
    tool_name = 'Bash', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'command'),
    tool_name IN ('Read', 'Edit', 'Write', 'NotebookEdit'), JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'file_path'),
    tool_name IN ('Grep', 'Glob'), JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'pattern'),
    tool_name = 'WebFetch', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'url'),
    tool_name = 'WebSearch', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'query'),
    tool_name = 'Task', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'description'),
    tool_name = 'Skill', JSONExtractString(raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'skill'),
    ''
  ) AS tool_detail,
  latency_ms
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type = 'PostToolUse'
  AND latency_ms IS NOT NULL
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
ORDER BY latency_ms DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Error rate over time by tool_name

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  tool_name AS metric,
  countIf(event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure') / nullIf(countIf(event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure')), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure')
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
  AND (agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(agent_name, ' v', agent_version)))
  AND (skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(skill_name, ' v', skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], tool_name))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Permission-denied rate over time by tool_name

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfHour(timestamp) AS time,
  tool_name AS metric,
  countIf(event_type = 'PermissionDenied') / nullIf(countIf(event_type IN ('PermissionRequest', 'PermissionDenied')), 0) AS value
FROM agent_events
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND event_type IN ('PermissionRequest', 'PermissionDenied')
  AND tool_name != ''
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

spec.title: Full trace of selected session(s) - click the magnifier on prompt/response/raw_payload to see full text

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  ev.user_id,
  ev.session_id,
  ev.turn_id,
  ev.sequence_id,
  ev.timestamp,
  ev.event_type,
  ev.tool_name,
  multiIf(
    ev.tool_name = 'Bash', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'command'),
    ev.tool_name IN ('Read', 'Edit', 'Write', 'NotebookEdit'), JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'file_path'),
    ev.tool_name IN ('Grep', 'Glob'), JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'pattern'),
    ev.tool_name = 'WebFetch', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'url'),
    ev.tool_name = 'WebSearch', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'query'),
    ev.tool_name = 'Task', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'description'),
    ev.tool_name = 'Skill', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'skill'),
    ''
  ) AS tool_detail,
  ev.agent_name,
  ev.agent_version,
  ev.skill_name,
  ev.skill_version,
  ev.status,
  ev.latency_ms,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  ev.raw_payload
FROM agent_events ev
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = ev.session_id AND m.turn_id = ev.turn_id AND m.agent_name = ev.agent_name
WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], ev.user_id)
  AND (ev.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(ev.agent_name, ' v', ev.agent_version)))
  AND (ev.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(ev.skill_name, ' v', ev.skill_version)))
  AND (NOT startsWith(ev.tool_name, 'mcp__') OR has([${mcp_tool:singlequote}], ev.tool_name))
ORDER BY ev.session_id, ev.turn_id ASC, ev.sequence_id ASC

WITH
main_rows AS (
  SELECT
    ev.turn_id AS turn_id,
    ev.sequence_id AS seq,
    ev.timestamp AS time,
    ev.agent_name AS agent_name,
    ev.raw_payload AS raw_payload,
    multiIf(
      ev.event_type = 'UserPromptSubmit', 'UserPromptSubmit',
      ev.event_type = 'SubagentStart', 'SubagentStart',
      ev.event_type = 'SubagentStop', 'SubagentStop',
      ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure'), ev.tool_name,
      ev.event_type IN ('Stop', 'StopFailure'), ev.event_type,
      ''
    ) AS label,
    multiIf(
      ev.tool_name = 'Bash', substring(replaceRegexpAll(JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'command'), '\\s+', ' '), 1, 70),
      ev.tool_name IN ('Read', 'Edit', 'Write', 'NotebookEdit'), JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'file_path'),
      ev.tool_name IN ('Grep', 'Glob'), JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'pattern'),
      ev.tool_name = 'Skill', JSONExtractString(ev.raw_payload, 'tool_input', 'skill'),
      ''
    ) AS detail,
    ev.status AS status,
    ev.latency_ms AS latency_ms
  FROM agent_events ev
  WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], ev.session_id)
    AND ev.event_type IN ('UserPromptSubmit', 'PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure', 'Stop', 'StopFailure', 'SubagentStart', 'SubagentStop')
    AND NOT (ev.event_type IN ('SubagentStart', 'SubagentStop') AND ev.agent_name = '')
),
turn_bounds AS (
  SELECT turn_id, min(time) AS turn_time FROM main_rows GROUP BY turn_id
),
usage_agent AS (
  SELECT turn_id, agent_name,
    sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS tok,
    sum(input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id) AND u.agent_name != ''
  GROUP BY turn_id, agent_name
),
usage_main AS (
  SELECT turn_id,
    sum(input_tokens + output_tokens) AS tok,
    sum(input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE has([${session_id:singlequote}], u.session_id) AND u.agent_name = '' AND u.skill_name = ''
  GROUP BY turn_id
),
content AS (
  SELECT
    m.turn_id AS turn_id, toInt64(m.seq) AS seq_order, m.time AS time,
    concat(
      repeat('    ', if(m.agent_name != '', 2, 1)),
      if(m.agent_name != '', concat('[', m.agent_name, '] '), ''),
      m.label,
      if(m.detail != '', concat(' `', m.detail, '`'), ''),
      if(m.status = 'error', ' [FAIL]', ''),
      if(m.latency_ms IS NOT NULL, concat(' - ', toString(m.latency_ms), 'ms'), ''),
      if(m.label = 'SubagentStop' AND ua.tok > 0, concat(' - ', toString(ua.tok), ' tok - $', toString(round(ua.cost, 4))), ''),
      if(m.label IN ('Stop', 'StopFailure') AND um.tok > 0, concat(' - ', toString(um.tok), ' tok - $', toString(round(um.cost, 4))), '')
    ) AS call,
    m.raw_payload AS raw_payload
  FROM main_rows m
  LEFT JOIN usage_agent ua ON ua.turn_id = m.turn_id AND ua.agent_name = m.agent_name AND m.agent_name != ''
  LEFT JOIN usage_main um ON um.turn_id = m.turn_id
),
headers AS (
  SELECT turn_id, toInt64(-1) AS seq_order, turn_time AS time,
    concat('Turn ', toString(turn_id)) AS call, '{}' AS raw_payload
  FROM turn_bounds
)
SELECT time, turn_id, call, raw_payload FROM (
  SELECT * FROM headers UNION ALL SELECT * FROM content
) ORDER BY turn_id, seq_order

SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.user_id,
  any(ev.started_at) AS started_at,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS tokens,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS cost,
  any(ev.duration_s) AS duration_s
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT session_id, min(timestamp) AS started_at, dateDiff('second', min(timestamp), max(timestamp)) AS duration_s
  FROM agent_events
  GROUP BY session_id
) ev ON u.session_id = ev.session_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
  AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.user_id
ORDER BY cost DESC
LIMIT 10

spec.title: Top 10 most expensive prompts by tokens

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  u.session_id,
  u.turn_id,
  u.user_id,
  u.agent_name,
  m.prompt_text,
  m.response_text,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS total_tokens
FROM agent_usage u
LEFT JOIN agent_messages m
  ON m.session_id = u.session_id AND m.turn_id = u.turn_id AND m.agent_name = u.agent_name
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
  AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
GROUP BY u.session_id, u.turn_id, u.user_id, u.agent_name, m.prompt_text, m.response_text
ORDER BY total_tokens DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 'agent' AS kind, agent_name AS name, version, description, registered_at
FROM agent_registry
WHERE (agent_name, registered_at) IN (
  SELECT agent_name, max(registered_at) FROM agent_registry GROUP BY agent_name
)
UNION ALL
SELECT 'skill' AS kind, skill_name AS name, version, description, registered_at
FROM skill_registry
WHERE (skill_name, registered_at) IN (
  SELECT skill_name, max(registered_at) FROM skill_registry GROUP BY skill_name
)
ORDER BY kind, name

spec.title: Agent version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT u.*, u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE agent_name != ''
  GROUP BY agent_name, agent_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(agent_version) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY agent_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT agent_name, agent_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.agent_name = t.agent_name AND uf.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.agent_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.agent_name = t.agent_name AND ev.agent_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.agent_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.agent_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.agent_name = ua.agent_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.agent_name

spec.title: Skill version-change impact (before vs after adopting current version)

spec.rawSql:
WITH usage_f AS (
  SELECT u.*, u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6 AS cost
  FROM agent_usage u
  ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
  WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id) AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
),
events_f AS (
  SELECT * FROM agent_events WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
),
version_starts AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version, min(timestamp) AS started_at
  FROM usage_f
  WHERE skill_name != ''
  GROUP BY skill_name, skill_version
),
ordered AS (
  SELECT *,
    lagInFrame(skill_version) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_version,
    lagInFrame(started_at) OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at) AS prev_started_at,
    row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY skill_name ORDER BY started_at DESC) AS rn
  FROM version_starts
),
transitions AS (
  SELECT skill_name, skill_version AS current_version, started_at, prev_version, prev_started_at
  FROM ordered
  WHERE rn = 1 AND prev_version != ''
),
usage_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_tokens_after,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp >= t.started_at) AS avg_cost_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version, t.prev_version, t.started_at
),
usage_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    avgIf(uf.input_tokens + uf.output_tokens, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_tokens_before,
    avgIf(uf.cost, uf.timestamp < t.started_at AND uf.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) AS avg_cost_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN usage_f uf ON uf.skill_name = t.skill_name AND uf.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_after AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp >= t.started_at), 0) AS error_rate_after
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.current_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
),
events_before AS (
  SELECT t.skill_name, t.current_version,
    countIf(ev.event_type = 'PostToolUseFailure' AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at) / nullIf(countIf(ev.event_type IN ('PostToolUse', 'PostToolUseFailure') AND ev.timestamp < t.started_at AND ev.timestamp >= t.prev_started_at), 0) AS error_rate_before
  FROM transitions t
  LEFT JOIN events_f ev ON ev.skill_name = t.skill_name AND ev.skill_version = t.prev_version
  GROUP BY t.skill_name, t.current_version
)
SELECT
  ua.skill_name, ua.prev_version, ua.current_version, ua.started_at,
  ub.avg_tokens_before, ua.avg_tokens_after,
  ub.avg_cost_before, ua.avg_cost_after,
  eb.error_rate_before, ea.error_rate_after
FROM usage_after ua
LEFT JOIN usage_before ub ON ub.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ub.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_after ea ON ea.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND ea.current_version = ua.current_version
LEFT JOIN events_before eb ON eb.skill_name = ua.skill_name AND eb.current_version = ua.current_version
ORDER BY ua.skill_name

WITH filtered AS (
  SELECT toStartOfDay(u.timestamp) AS time, u.user_id AS metric,
    sum(u.input_tokens) AS in_val, sum(u.output_tokens) AS out_val
  FROM agent_usage u
  WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
    AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
    AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  GROUP BY time, metric
)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↓') AS metric, in_val AS value FROM filtered
  UNION ALL
  SELECT time, concat(metric, ' ↑') AS metric, out_val AS value FROM filtered
) ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfDay(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  u.user_id AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens + u.output_tokens) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
  AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  toStartOfWeek(u.timestamp) AS time,
  concat(multiIf(u.agent_name != '', 'subagent', u.skill_name != '', 'skill', 'main agent'), ' - ', u.model) AS metric,
  sum(u.input_tokens * p.price_in_per_mtok / 1e6 + u.output_tokens * p.price_out_per_mtok / 1e6) AS value
FROM agent_usage u
ASOF LEFT JOIN model_pricing p ON u.model = p.model AND u.timestamp >= p.effective_from
WHERE $__timeFilter(u.timestamp)
  AND has([${user_id:singlequote}], u.user_id)
  AND has([${model:singlequote}], u.model)
  AND (u.agent_name = '' OR has([${agent_version:singlequote}], concat(u.agent_name, ' v', u.agent_version)))
  AND (u.skill_name = '' OR has([${skill_version:singlequote}], concat(u.skill_name, ' v', u.skill_version)))
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time
SELECT DISTINCT concat(agent_name, ' v', version) AS av FROM agent_registry ORDER BY av
SELECT DISTINCT concat(skill_name, ' v', version) AS sv FROM skill_registry ORDER BY sv

SELECT DISTINCT
  tool_name AS __value,
  replaceOne(tool_name, 'mcp__', '') AS __text
FROM agent_events
WHERE startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')
UNION ALL
SELECT '' AS __value, '(no MCP tool calls yet)' AS __text
WHERE (SELECT count() FROM agent_events WHERE startsWith(tool_name, 'mcp__')) = 0
ORDER BY __value
SELECT DISTINCT model FROM agent_usage ORDER BY model
SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM agent_events ORDER BY user_id

SELECT
  session_id AS __value,
  concat(any(user_id), ' - ', session_id) AS __text
FROM agent_events
WHERE has([${user_id:singlequote}], user_id)
GROUP BY session_id
ORDER BY max(timestamp) DESC
LIMIT 200
